title: HEAD TEACHER'S MESSAGE
name: NYAWERE JANE
message_preview: On behalf of the Manage­ment, Ad­ministration, staff and pupils, I give sincere honor to the almighty for the pre­cious life and knowledge, God has passed on to us, the Sir Apollo Kaggwa community, our dear Parents and our Country at Large.Sir Apollo Kaggwa is a renowned boarding school in Kampala respected for its academic excellence manifested over the years. The school started in 1996 with 300 pupils.
image_alt: Portrait of Head Teacher NYAWERE JANE
